HGSS.123.0000:
Zuki: That’s right.
This is where we welcome LUGIA.\f
When the dance we practiced many days
becomes one with the sound of the\r
Tidal Bell we entrusted with you, then\r
LUGIA shall come out from deep within\r
the waterfall basin once again!\f
HGSS.123.0001:
This is all we can do for you...
What you do now is entirely up to you...
HGSS.123.0002:
That is indeed LUGIA...
The guardian of these islands from\r
ancient times...\f
So many have tried again and again,
only to fail...\f
[0103,0000,0000], your heart in complete
harmony with the Tidal Bell has finally\r
allowed it to appear...\f
HGSS.123.0003:
[0103,0000,0000], don’t you see?\f
LUGIA... It must have been waiting for
someone like you all this time.\r
Wouldn’t you agree...?
HGSS.123.0005:
You’ve done a great job. Say hello to
Professor Elm for us.
HGSS.123.0006:
You have not only made LUGIA appear,
but you also caught it...\f
You are so wonderful.
There is nothing more for us to say.\f
Take good care of yourself in
your journey...
HGSS.123.0007:
If that is what you believe, we will not
try to convince you otherwise.\f
Still, if you wish to see LUGIA once
more, perhaps you can come back here\r
after all has been settled...
HGSS.123.0008:
I think once you turn your back to it,
LUGIA will not come back for\r
some time...\f
If you want to see LUGIA, perhaps you
can come back here after all\r
has been settled...
